description_long: This is a plush, pink stuffed toy designed to resemble a cartoonish octopus. Its body is round and soft, with eight short, rounded tentacles radiating from the base. The surface is covered in a fuzzy, velvety fabric, giving it a gentle and inviting appearance. The face features two large, black, embroidered eyes and a small, smiling mouth, adding to its friendly and approachable character. A small white tag is attached to one of the tentacles, and a short white fabric loop is visible on top of the head. The overall construction suggests it is lightweight and squeezable, ideal for cuddling or decorative use in urban environments such as parks or playgrounds.
description: A soft, pink plush octopus toy with a round body, eight stubby tentacles, and a smiling face. Its fuzzy surface and embroidered features give it a cute and friendly appearance.
description_view_0: The side view highlights the roundness of the body, one visible eye, and several tentacles extending outward.
description_view_1: The front view shows the smiling face with both eyes and the mouth clearly visible, along with the symmetrical arrangement of the tentacles.
description_view_2: The opposite side view displays the other eye, the plush texture, and the attached tag on one tentacle.
description_view_3: The top view reveals the circular shape of the body, the white fabric loop on top, and the arrangement of all eight tentacles around the base.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is cheerful and friendly, with large, round black eyes and a small, curved smiling mouth. There are no eyebrows or other expressive features.
attribute_pose_or_posture: The toy is in a relaxed, resting posture with its round body centered and all eight tentacles splayed outward evenly.
